headline: Netflix Board of Directors authorizes an additional $25 billion common stock repurchase program.
investor_impact: The massive $25 billion share repurchase authorization signals strong management confidence in sustained free cash flow generation and provides significant downside support for the stock. This aggressive capital return strategy will be highly accretive to EPS and highlights a maturing capital allocation framework.
key_figures: $6.8 billion available for repurchase as of March 31, 2026
